data.body: Doc-hygiene done (comment/doc text only, no runtime change). DECISION: AutoStrategy/ProviderStrategy spike is moot — superseded by the pydantic_ai runtime cutover; no migration needed. Verified no forced-tool strategy classes exist: grep -rE 'ToolStrategy|AutoStrategy|ProviderStrategy' src/rebar returns zero matches. Edits: (1) runner.py RunRequest.thinking comment (~l67-78) — reframed PromptedOutput-on-thinking as a CURRENT Anthropic-400 API constraint, not a forced-tool workaround; (2) runner.py PydanticAIRunner docstring (~l148-151, surfaced by plan-review advisory) — output is selected by output_mode() (NativeOutput/PromptedOutput, no forced-tool ToolOutput); corrected stale 'reliability hardening layered on in a later story (1268)' to present-tense (1268 is shipped); (3) structured.py module docstring (~l9-15) — relabelled the thinking+ToolOutput-400 note as a live API constraint on current pydantic_ai output modes, not a relic of a removed forced-tool mechanism; (4) structured.py output_mode() docstring (~l52-56) — same relabel. Preserved the genuinely-still-true Anthropic-400 (thinking + native/forced constraint) rationale and the PromptedOutput-choice reasoning per plan-review advisories fc8dbf/f6ec7b. make lint clean; pytest -k 'runner or structured' 116 passed/2 skipped; pytest -k llm 125 passed/11 skipped.
